channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Simone Callahan recalls the moment she learned of Shane Warne's sudden death
item.description: Simone Callahan, ex-wife of cricket legend Shane Warne, has opened up about the harrowing moment she realised he had passed away. Speaking candidly on her son Jackson's podcast, Warnes Way, she recoun...

item.title: Adventure Tourism in Kashmir Comes to a Standstill After Recent Closures
item.description: For almost twenty years, adventure tourism had turned Kashmir’s mountainous regions into a popular destination for both domestic and international tourists. Trekkers explored alpine meadows, glacier-f...

item.title: Canceling Offshore Wind Projects Raises Costs and Risks for U.S. Energy Supply
item.description: The article argues that recent agreements by the Trump administration to pay nearly $2 billion to offshore wind developers to cancel planned projects could have long-term economic and energy consequen...

item.title: Durban City Struggle to Find Goals as Season Closes
item.description: Durban City FC have now gone six games without a win, though their overall play hasn’t looked weak. The team’s main issue has been composure in front of goal, with a few soft touches needed to turn ch...

item.title: 18-year-old dies after falling from Brisbane hotel balcony during police pursuit
item.description: An 18-year-old man tragically lost his life after falling six storeys from a hotel in inner-Brisbane while attempting to evade police. The incident occurred at a building on Wickham Terrace, Spring Hi...

item.title: Comelec Prepares for 2026 Barangay and SK Elections
item.description: The Commission on Elections (Comelec) announced that it is 90% to 95% prepared for the upcoming 2026 Barangay and Sangguniang Kabataan Elections (BSKE) scheduled on November 2, 2026. According to Come...

item.title: Police arrest suspect following death of man in Bristol roof garden
item.description: Police in Bristol have launched a murder investigation after the body of a man was discovered in a roof garden. Authorities confirmed that an individual has been arrested in connection with the incide...

item.title: Naija News Roundup: Major Political Developments and Sports Update for 10th May 2026
item.description: Good morning, Naija! Today, Sunday 10th May 2026, we get the latest gist from top Nigerian newspapers. PDP don warn people make dem no pay attention to any campaign posters wey dey show former Preside...

item.title: Judicial Commission of Pakistan to Decide Panel for High Court Appointments
item.description: Islamabad: The Judicial Commission of Pakistan (JCP) is expected to finalise the composition of a committee that will interview candidates for elevation to the high courts. This follows the 27th Const...

item.title: Manchester City Secure 3-0 Win Over Brentford to Stay in Premier League Title Race
item.description: Manchester City show strong determination as dem beat Brentford 3-0 for Etihad Stadium, keeping their Premier League title ambition alive. Even though the scoreline look comfortable, the match no easy...

item.title: Mother and Son Graduate Summa Cum Laude Together at UKZN
item.description: A Greenwood Park mother and son, Melissa and Calem Gilbert, are set to graduate summa cum laude from the University of KwaZulu-Natal, marking a shared achievement in both academic excellence and perso...

item.title: Atiku, Amaechi, Hayatudeen Collect ADC Forms for 2027 Presidential Race
item.description: As the 2027 presidential election dey waka closer, the African Democratic Congress (ADC) don start to see action as three big political players don show interest to run on their platform. Mohammed Hay...

item.title: Oshawa homicide under investigation by Durham Police
item.description: Durham Regional Police are actively investigating a homicide in Oshawa. The details surrounding the incident are limited at this time, but the police are urging anyone with information to come forward...

item.title: US-Iran Peace Talks Continue Amid Tensions in West Asia
item.description: The situation in West Asia remains tense as the conflict involving Iran and Israel continues. On May 9, 2026, U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio met with Qatar's Prime Minister Sheikh Mohammed bin Ab...

item.title: David Maraga Alleges Cost Inflation in Rironi-Mau Summit Road Project by Ruto Administration
item.description: Former Chief Justice David Maraga has openly criticized President William Ruto over the handling of the Rironi-Mau Summit Road project. Speaking during a funeral service in Kitutu Chache North, Maraga...

item.title: One Nation wins Farrer by-election as Liberal Party faces major setback in regional seat
item.description: In a significant development in Australian federal politics, One Nation candidate David Farley has won the Farrer by-election, marking a historic shift in a seat long held by the Liberal Party since 1...

item.title: President Zardari honours military on Marka-e-Haq anniversary, praises leadership and unity
item.description: On the first anniversary of Marka-e-Haq, President Asif Ali Zardari paid tribute to Pakistan’s armed forces and the nation, acknowledging the decisive and disciplined response against external aggress...

item.title: Nelson Mandela Bay Mayor Oversees Flood Relief and Water Management Efforts
item.description: Nelson Mandela Bay Executive Mayor Babalwa Lobishe has been actively overseeing relief efforts in flood-affected areas across the metro, following heavy rains that forced over 1 000 residents, mostly ...

item.title: Starmer appoints Gordon Brown as UK special envoy on global finance followingLabour election losses
item.description: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer has appointed former Prime Minister Gordon Brown as the UK's special envoy on global finance, a move aimed at uniting factional tensions within the Labour Party aft...

item.title: President Marcos Honors Mothers for Their Dedication and Love on Mother’s Day
item.description: On Mother’s Day, President Ferdinand “Bongbong” Marcos Jr. publicly acknowledged the vital role of mothers in Filipino families and communities. Through a social media post, he highlighted how mothers...
